use_cases: Personal productivity apps for managing daily tasks
Team collaboration tools requiring animated task management
Project management dashboards with interactive to-do lists
ai_summary: A minimalist animated to-do list component with framer-motion interactions including smooth item vanish animations on removal and checkbox state changes. Features task time tracking, a form for adding new items, and a grid pattern background. Designed for productivity applications where visual polish and smooth micro-interactions enhance user engagement.
